chains.root_cause: Missing tip-attachment step before liquid handling
chains.reason: Pipette state enters aspirate/dispense operations without a tip.
cascading_violations: ASPIRATE_NO_TIP: aspirate attempted with no tip attached
DISPENSE_NO_TIP: dispense attempted with no tip attached
chains.impact: High contamination risk and batch invalidation.
chains.fix: Insert PickUpTip before first aspirate and enforce tip state transitions.

chains.reason: Dispense/aspirate plans exceed well or tip capacity bounds.
cascading_violations: Potential deck spill and contamination cascade
chains.impact: Operational failure and possible hardware contamination.
chains.fix: Split transfers and enforce capacity-aware scheduling.

chains.root_cause: Incompatible pipette selection for requested volume
chains.reason: Requested transfer volume outside pipette calibrated range.
cascading_violations: PIPETTE_RANGE_VIOLATION: inaccurate or unsafe volume request
chains.impact: Reduced accuracy and potential experiment drift.
chains.fix: Select a compatible pipette or split volume into safe increments.
